song.title: You Shine
song.author: Brian Doerkson
song.presentation: V1 P1 C V1 P2 C2
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D Em Why should I fear man when You made the heavens? .G D A Why should I be afraid when You put the stars in place? .D Em Why should I lose heart when I know how great You are? .G D A Why should I give up when Your plans are full of love?
[P1] .Bm Em In this world we will have trouble .D/F# G A But You have overcome the world
[C] .D A/C# G A You shine brighter than the brightest star .D A/C# G A Your love purer than the purest heart .G D/F# G D/F# A D You shine, filling us with courage and strength to follow You
[P2] .Bm Em In this world we will have trouble .D/F# G A But You have overcome the world .D/F# G A But You have overcome the world
[C2] .E B/E A B You shine brighter than the brightest star .E B/E A B Your love purer than the purest heart .A E/G# A E/G# B E You shine, filling us with courage and strength to follow You
